---
name: Bug report
about: Something the agent did wrong, broke, or produced unexpected output
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug. What did the agent produce vs. what you expected?

## Steps to reproduce

1. Source materials used (e.g., 12-lecture NLP course PDFs)
2. Phase 1 intake answers (course / purpose / depth / format / language)
3. Exact prompt given to the agent
4. Vault path
5. Where the failure occurred (which phase / which file)

## Expected behaviour

What you expected the agent to produce.

## Actual output

- Files created / modified
- Error messages (if any)
- Sample of unexpected content (with personal info redacted)

## Environment

- Claude Code version: `claude --version`
- Operating system: (macOS / Linux / Windows / WSL)
- Obsidian version:
- Source material types: (PDF / PPTX / .ipynb / .py / .md)
- Approximate vault size: (number of lectures, concepts, labs)

## Additional context

Anything else relevant - agent invocation logs, `.vault-progress.md` snippet, or screenshots.
